title: Undopia Paperless Dyes
description: Removes the Paper from the Dyes textures
body:
![paperless-dyes](https://i.imgur.com/aZjujd9.png) # Undopia Paperless Dyes [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/undopia-paperless-dyes?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&label=Modrinth&color=%231bd96a) ](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/undopia-paperless-dyes) [![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1427528?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&label=CurseForge&color=%23f16436) ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/undopia-paperless-dyes) [![ko-fi](https://i.imgur.com/wv1uE4k.png)](https://ko-fi.com/undugt) Undopia Paperless Dyes removes the Paper texture from the updated Dyes from 1.21.9. ---
[![Undopia Patch Resource Pack](https://i.imgur.com/beZ50qS.png)](https://patch.undopia.net) This resource pack is part of the Undopia Patch family. It is made of these Undopia Patch Features ![Bw0VxZ4.png](https://i.imgur.com/Bw0VxZ4.png) If you want to customize any of these use the Undopia Patch Customizer.
--- [![Customizer](https://i.imgur.com/UEAZSvr.png)](https://patch.undopia.net/custom-downloads/) [![FAQ](https://i.imgur.com/GGUjVLj.png)](https://patch.undopia.net/faq) [![Terms & Conditions](https://i.imgur.com/kVzzs3F.png)](https://patch.undopia.net/terms-and-conditions) [![Bug Report / Feature Suggestion](https://i.imgur.com/mYSKqtv.png)](https://github.com/UnduGT/undopiapatch/issues)
